items.title: Daily wage earners 31% of all suicide deaths in 2024, highest in a decade: NCRB
items.summary: Daily wage earners constituted 31% of all suicide deaths in 2024, the highest in a decade, with 52,910 such fatalities. This marks a significant increase from previous years, as...
